project_type: TypeScript monorepo - Quant Ecosystem with pnpm workspaces
build_system: pnpm with tsc (composite project references), vitest for testing
test_framework: vitest with vi.fn() mocks, describe/it/expect pattern
verification_instructions: Run typecheck with `pnpm --filter @quant/quant-live run typecheck` then run tests with `pnpm --filter @quant/quant-live run test`
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access available. Node.js v22 with pnpm.
contribution_requirements: <=500 LOC per PR. All gates must pass. Privacy lamp cannot be programmatically hidden or disabled.
key_patterns: EventEmitter pattern with callback subscriptions (onX returning unsubscribe fn). Types in types.ts at package root. Tests in src/__tests__/. Capture modules use PrivacyCallback pattern. Index.ts re-exports all public API.
directory_structure: packages/quant-live/src/ contains: core/ (session-manager, pipeline, latency-tracker), asr/ (streaming, whisper, webgpu, vad, adaptive-vad), tts/ (factory, elevenlabs, kokoro, prefetch-buffer), conversation/ (turn-manager, transcript), llm/ (streaming, quant-ai, tool-bridge, sentence-splitter), capture/ (camera, screen), grounding/ (multimodal, context-retriever), __tests__/ (test files mirroring src structure), types.ts, index.ts
